attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM  AS BK_QUOTE_NUM ,
Q_LINE.LINE_NUMBER AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_NUM,
CAST(COALESCE(Q_LINE.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,-999)AS BIGINT) AS BK_PARENT_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_NUM,
SM.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY  AS  BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY     ,
COALESCE(PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,-999) as PARENT_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(NDQ.FULFILLMENT_TYPE_CD,-999) AS FULLFILLMENT_TYPE_CD,
-999 as SRC_REPORTED_UPLIFT_FACTOR_RT,
0 AS TOTAL_LINE_COST_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_DESCR,
coalesce(Q_LINE.CREATED_DATE,DATE)  AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.UPDATED_DATE,DATE) AS SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.LINE_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_QUOTE_LINE_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN coalesce(Q_LINE.QUANTITY,0) >2147483647 THEN 0 ELSE coalesce(Q_LINE.QUANTITY,0) END AS EXPECTED_QTY,
/*COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_LIST_PRICE,0) AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,*/
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_LIST_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL,0) AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_GPL_USD_AM,
/*COALESCE(Q_LINE.FINAL_NET_PRICE,0) AS FINAL_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,*/
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.FINAL_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as FINAL_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.DURATION,'999') AS EXPECTED_DURATION_CNT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.MLB_INDICATOR,'N') AS MLB_IND_FLG,
'Y' AS ACTIVE_FLG,
COALESCE(CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
COALESCE(UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
COALESCE(NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,-999) AS BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
COALESCE(NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,-999) AS BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
coalesce(Q_LINE.OBJECT_ID,-999)AS SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
0 AS RU_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT,
/*coalesce(Q_LINE.NONSTANDARD_DISC,0) AS NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,*/
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.NONSTANDARD_DISC,0)* EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
/*coalesce(Q_LINE.PROMO_DISC,0) AS PROMITIONAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,*/
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.PROMO_DISC,0)*  EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as PROMITIONAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
/*coalesce(Q_LINE.TRADE_IN_DISC,0) AS TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,*/
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.TRADE_IN_DISC,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
/*coalesce(Q_LINE.MULTI_YEAR_DISC,0) AS MULTI_YEAR_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,*/
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.MULTI_YEAR_DISC,0)* EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as MULTI_YEAR_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
/*coalesce(Q_LINE.CONTRACTUAL_DISC,0) AS CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,*/
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.CONTRACTUAL_DISC,0)* EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
coalesce(Q_LINE.WEB_ORDER_ID,0) AS  WEB_ORDER_ID     ,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.ORDER_STATUS,'UNKNOWN')   AS DEAL_QUOTE_LN_ORD_STATUS_CD,          
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ,
USER,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.WF_PRICED,'N') AS WATERFALL_PRICING_FLG     ,    
COALESCE(Q_LINE.SMT_LINE_ID_INT,-999)   AS EP_SMT_LINE_ID_INT        ,    
COALESCE(Q_LINE. SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN')   AS SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER_CD        ,
/*COALESCE(Q_LINE.NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC,0) as NEGO_ADJSTD_DSCNT_USD_AMT ,*/
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC,0)* EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT as decimal(26,7)) as NEGO_ADJSTD_DSCNT_USD_AMT,
CAST (COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_STD_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD,0) as EXTD_NET_PRICE_STD_LOCAL_AMT,
CAST (CAST(COALESCE(Q_LINE.ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0)AS DECIMAL(26,7))* EXPECTED_QTY as decimal(26,7))as ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,
CAST(COALESCE(Q_LINE.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,0)*COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0) as decimal(26,7)) as TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,
/*COALESCE(EL.LOV_SUBTYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_QUOTE_LINE_SUBTYPE_CD    ,*/
'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_QUOTE_LINE_SUBTYPE_CD ,
OEM_REB_FLAG,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(PROGRAM_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS PROGRAM_ID,
COALESCE(AS_PROJECT_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS AS_PROJECT_NUMBER,
COALESCE(ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,'UNKNOWN') AS ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
coalesce(Q_LINE.NONSTANDARD_DISC,0) AS NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,
coalesce(Q_LINE.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,0) AS STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,
coalesce(Q_LINE.SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,0) AS SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
UI_HIDE_FLG,
SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
ACTION_TAG_NM,
AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
BILLING_MODEL_NM,
PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
RATE_TABLE_NM,
RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
USAGE_QTY,
SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
'CCWR' SS_CD,
REQUESTED_START_DT,
REQUESTED_END_DT,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.MAGIC_KEY_ID,'UNKNOWN') as MAGIC_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.MONTHLY_RECURRING_USD_AMT,-999.000000) as MONTHLY_RECURRING_USD_AMT,
TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
Q_LINE.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.INSTANCE_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS INSTANCE_ID,
COALESCE(Q_LINE.SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID

FROM 
(
SELECT
OBJECT_ID                     ,
PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID         ,
LINE_NUMBER                   ,
QUOTE_OBJECT_ID               ,
LINE_TYPE                     ,
LINE_TYPE_NAME                ,
EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL            ,
EXT_LIST_PRICE                ,
QUANTITY                      ,
FINAL_NET_PRICE               ,
PART_NUMBER                   ,
DESCRIPTION                   ,
FULFILLMENT_TYPE              ,
DURATION                      ,
CONTRACTUAL_DISC              ,
MLB_INDICATOR                 ,
PROMO_DISC                    ,
NONSTANDARD_DISC              ,
TRADE_IN_DISC                 ,
MULTI_YEAR_DISC               ,
ACTIVE                        ,
CREATED_DATE                  ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
UPDATED_DATE                  ,
UPDATED_BY                    ,
WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
ORDER_STATUS                  ,
WF_PRICED                     ,
SMT_LINE_ID_INT               ,
SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER           ,
EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD         ,
NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC      ,
ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT    ,
TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD  ,
OEM_REB_FLAG,
PROGRAM_ID,
AS_PROJECT_NUMBER,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
UI_HIDE_FLG,
SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
ACTION_TAG_NM,
AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
BILLING_MODEL_NM,
PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
RATE_TABLE_NM,
RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
USAGE_QTY,
SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
REQUESTED_START_DATE AS REQUESTED_START_DT,
REQUESTED_END_DATE AS REQUESTED_END_DT,
COALESCE(MAGIC_KEY,'UNKNOWN') as MAGIC_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(MONTHLY_RECURRING_COST,-999.000000) as MONTHLY_RECURRING_USD_AMT,
TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM,
INSTANCE_ID,
QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
COALESCE(QUOTE_STATUS,'UNKNOWN')  AS QUOTE_STATUS,
PRICE_LIST_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_RNWL_VW
/*COMMENTED AS PART OF CCW DATA FIX AUG REL*/
/*UNION ALL
SELECT 
OBJECT_ID                     ,
PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID         ,
LINE_NUMBER                   ,
QUOTE_OBJECT_ID               ,
LINE_TYPE                     ,
LINE_TYPE_NAME                ,
EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL            ,
EXT_LIST_PRICE                ,
QUANTITY                      ,
FINAL_NET_PRICE               ,
PART_NUMBER                   ,
DESCRIPTION                   ,
FULFILLMENT_TYPE              ,
DURATION                      ,
CONTRACTUAL_DISC              ,
MLB_INDICATOR                 ,
PROMO_DISC                    ,
NONSTANDARD_DISC              ,
TRADE_IN_DISC                 ,
MULTI_YEAR_DISC               ,
ACTIVE                        ,
CREATED_DATE                  ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
UPDATED_DATE                  ,
UPDATED_BY                    ,
WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
ORDER_STATUS                  ,
WF_PRICED                     ,
SMT_LINE_ID_INT               ,
SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER           ,
EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD         ,
NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC      ,
ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT    ,
TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD  ,
OEM_REB_FLAG,
PROGRAM_ID,
AS_PROJECT_NUMBER,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
UI_HIDE_FLG,
SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
ACTION_TAG_NM,
AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
BILLING_MODEL_NM,
PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
RATE_TABLE_NM,
RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
USAGE_QTY,
SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
REQUESTED_START_DATE AS REQUESTED_START_DT,
REQUESTED_END_DATE AS REQUESTED_END_DT,
COALESCE(MAGIC_KEY,'UNKNOWN') as MAGIC_KEY_ID,
COALESCE(MONTHLY_RECURRING_COST,-999.000000) as MONTHLY_RECURRING_USD_AMT,
TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM,
INSTANCE_ID,
QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
COALESCE(QUOTE_STATUS,'UNKNOWN')  AS QUOTE_STATUS,
PRICE_LIST_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_RNWL_VW*/ )Q_LINE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ
ON NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT = Q_LINE.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID
AND NDQ.SS_CODE='CCWR'
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_PRICE_LIST_RNWL_QUOTE_LINE PRICE_LST
ON PRICE_LST.PRICE_LIST_ID =  Q_LINE.PRICE_LIST_ID
LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NDAILY
ON NDAILY.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = PRICE_LST.CURRENCY_CODE AND 
NDAILY.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD' AND
NDAILY.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = Q_LINE.PART_NUMBER
/*LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_LOV EL
ON Q_LINE.LINE_TYPE=EL.LOV_INDEX
AND EL.LOV_TYPE='BOM_LINE_TYPE'*/
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE SM
ON SM.SK_OBJECT_ID_INT = Q_LINE.OBJECT_ID
AND SM.SS_CODE = 'CCWR'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY ORDER BY Q_LINE.OBJECT_ID DESC)=1
WHERE UPPER(Q_LINE.QUOTE_STATUS) <> 'DELETED'

SELECT 
OBJECT_ID, 
PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
LINE_NUMBER, 
QUOTE_OBJECT_ID, 
LINE_TYPE, 
LINE_TYPE_NAME, 
EXT_LIST_PRICE_GPL, 
EXT_LIST_PRICE, 
QUANTITY, 
FINAL_NET_PRICE, 
PART_NUMBER, 
DESCRIPTION, 
FULFILLMENT_TYPE, 
DURATION, 
CONTRACTUAL_DISC, 
MLB_INDICATOR, 
PROMO_DISC, 
NONSTANDARD_DISC, 
TRADE_IN_DISC, MULTI_YEAR_DISC, 
ACTIVE, 
CREATED_DATE, 
CREATED_BY, 
UPDATED_DATE, 
UPDATED_BY, 
WEB_ORDER_ID, 
ORDER_STATUS, 
WF_PRICED, 
SMT_LINE_ID_INT, 
SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER, 
EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_STD, 
NEGOTIATED_ADJUSTED_DISC, 
ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT, 
TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD, 
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE ,
OEM_REB_FLAG,
PROGRAM_ID,
AS_PROJECT_NUMBER,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
coalesce(SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,0) AS SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
UI_HIDE_FLG,
SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
ACTION_TAG_NM,
AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
BILLING_MODEL_NM,
PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
RATE_TABLE_NM,
RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
USAGE_QTY,
SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
REQUESTED_START_DATE,
REQUESTED_END_DATE,
MAGIC_KEY,
MONTHLY_RECURRING_COST,
INSTANCE_ID ,
TRANSACTION_AI_FLG ,
AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD ,
TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME ,
AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT ,
AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM,
QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
QUOTE_STATUS,
PRICE_LIST_ID,
SUBSCRIPTION_REFERENCE_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LINE_RNWL_VW Q_LINE
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ 
WHERE  NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT = Q_LINE.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID AND NDQ.SS_CODE = 'CCWR' )
